textByHashes.0df043b29a0572bf4a68c4349560bbc7b0d67213: I'm fine, I'm fine. Just a scratch.
textByHashes.71942360319cc76bd74e17e301e1991079f5b6ed: It was a present. My employer thought it would suit me. I'm not sure it does, though it does keep the sun off very well.
textByHashes.359fc92aa580c01c738024a1a1b96d8850349667: Simon Templeton. He's an archaeologist. I worked as an assistant for him, though I haven't seen him since the plague business started, so I work for myself now.
textByHashes.83b8b004aafadda71c84810220ba18e042d4626c: Simon suggested that there might be riches to be found in this pyramid.
textByHashes.97d75d2d182bf027ea8ac1272c4502c5ff301b9b: All I've found so far are injuries though.
textByHashes.7f7164cd5f97d44bdbeb052cec33a04f079ee900: Well, I'm not sure. It's called Jalsavrah apparently. It's a strange place.
textByHashes.86b9b45c5e50480a5d34226a7b19487324d2824b: First of all, there's something odd about the doors. There's four of them, but three of them lead to an empty tomb.
textByHashes.350d9f0631be771253a518529553557b67d2b69e: The other one is guarded by something, and whatever it is, it doesn't like visitors.
textByHashes.f851fa5518f6699a86fc7ab26bfcbb7be1a26d67: The thing is, the doors seem to change around sometimes. It's all quite confusing.
textByHashes.ca3bab6c2a1ffdc72b6cbe40f97f81e6a6b1c16f: I think it might be a mummy. It's not very friendly, but it does allow you to enter some of the rooms in the tomb. They are dangerous though.
textByHashes.48cc174e38b016a13695262159f60a76a275be78: Are you sure? The place is full of poisonous snakes and scarabs along with some rather nasty mummies as well. You could die in there.
textByHashes.2c00268cc07ad38bd32cc698d7fbd836b360fb00: I managed to get into one room, but the next room was harder. My lockpicking skills weren't good enough. Maybe I should have taken a lockpick.
textByHashes.8bbd768b0f965503f7d8f41cd8d68a406f594a0c: There are lots of artefacts that you should be able to sell to a legitimate trader...
textByHashes.b4dd863c63fe27c4a18a03e0cffe1e45e3994ccc: Of course. He's as 'legitimate' as you can get.
textByHashes.c66bd1e85cd712ae5a446c286d419aaf19d3b4f4: I've heard a rumour that there is an ancient magic sceptre somewhere inside.
textByHashes.954af56f93c47f66d11f66c331372fad55a79f42: Not a lot. It's apparently made of gold and covered in jewels. It's supposed to have some magical powers as well.
textByHashes.2804bf3e74275e4a2a176a8a1cb373203a5ba2d3: I'll let you know when I find it!
textByHashes.d6db40e02e3dc2373126bfbf872c497373bd416a: Hey! if you find it, I deserve a share of the profits! You wouldn't have known it existed without my help.
textByHashes.53a3f659d2e910899e51944f2b4fb921a4d807b7: You've been inside? Did you find anything?
textByHashes.c8f5ddb5262398485854a46b507a5ccefce7778f: Well if you do, I'd appreciate a share of any profits.
textByHashes.dd5ad1178dae2da85a2d131caaa199d6c244c82e: Oh, hello. Any luck in the pyramid? I'd appreciate a cut of anything you find.
textByHashes.1c9284610077c14d92decb2e9d9d975e7e7c038d: Ohh... That looks nice. I'm looking forward to my cut.
textByHashes.8099460b61432ff7db8c3569dc477d9bfa74d620: Wow! It looks very valuable. What's my share?
textByHashes.0d35cbb507fa9f8d897fc86876ceb14acf13e342: Hey, that's not fair. I told you about this pyramid!
